SQLLite.SQL: SELECT WR.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID AS "WarrantReturnId" , WR.RETURN_CODE AS "ReturnCode" , WR.ADDITIONAL_INFORMATION AS "AdditionalInformation" FROM warrant_returns wr, warrants w WHERE w.case_number = ${param.caseNumber} AND w.warrant_number = ${param.warrantNumber} AND w.local_warrant_number IS NULL AND wr.warrant_id = w.warrant_id AND wr.warrant_returns_id = ( SELECT MAX(wr2.warrant_returns_id) FROM warrant_returns wr2 WHERE wr2.warrant_id = w.warrant_id AND TRUNC(wr2.warrant_return_date) = TO_DATE(${param.eventDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND NVL(wr2.error_indicator,'N') = 'N' )

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper
